title: Walden
author: Henry David Thoreau
content: “If a man does not keep pace with his companions, perhaps it is because he hears a different drummer. Let him step to the music which he hears, however measured or far away.”

title: The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn
author: Mark Twain
content: “Human beings can be awful cruel to one another.”

title: White Fang
author: Jack London
content: “The aim of life is self-preservation, but the motive of life is the struggle to live.”

title: Civil Disobedience
author: Henry David Thoreau
content: “That government is best which governs not at all.”

title: The Mysterious Stranger
author: Mark Twain
content: “There is no first and there is no last.”
action: View time as a continuous loop.
